title: Hooks Inspector Save
description: React data hooks for **Hooks Inspector Save**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.
context: React data hooks for **Hooks Inspector Save**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.

rules.requirement: save hook sends content originalHash and optional force
rules: Save MUST call `saveChangeArtifact` with the editor buffer, the last `originalHash` from GET, and `force: true` only after explicit user confirmation when approvals are active.

rules.requirement: save hook shows conflict UI on HTTP 409
rules: On `ArtifactConflictError`, the hook MUST stop spinners and present conflict resolution UI without discarding local edits silently.

rules.requirement: successful save triggers artifact and status refetch
rules: After success, the hook MUST refetch artifact content and preview and signal `ui:hooks-changes-read` to refresh status immediately.

scenarios.requirement: save hook sends content originalHash and optional force
scenarios.name: Save sends content and originalHash
given: editor has buffer and last GET hash
then: AND force is false by default

scenarios.name: Force save only after explicit confirm

scenarios.name: Successful save triggers refetch
then: AND changes-read status refresh is signaled

scenarios.name: 409 opens conflict dialog

scenarios.name: Reload discards local buffer

scenarios.requirement: save hook shows conflict UI on HTTP 409
scenarios.name: Force requires explicit confirm

scenarios.name: Save success refetches artifact
